message:
chore(deps): update fsqlite to 619d869 and close clippy issue tracker entry

- Cargo.lock: bumps all frankensqlite crates (fsqlite, fsqlite-ast,
  fsqlite-btree, fsqlite-core, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-ext-fts5,
  fsqlite-ext-json, fsqlite-ext-rtree, fsqlite-func) from commit
  c390150 to 619d869.

- .beads/issues.jsonl: marks beads_rust-3qnj ("Fix all clippy errors")
  as closed with assignee HazyWaterfall, reflecting the completion of
  the clippy remediation work in the preceding commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
